title: How mobile’s measurement playbook is solving the web’s fragmentation problem
description: Ran Avrahamy, Chief Marketing Officer, AppsFlyer Web marketers have spent years building performance measurement on a foundation that is increasingly hard to trust. Cookies are unreliable, platform self-reporting is contradictory and AI-generated discovery is eating into observable traffic. And the signals that once made the web feel legible — referral paths, session data, conversion events […]
title_en: Mobile Measurement Strategies Address Web Attribution Challenges as AI Discovery Disrupts Traditional Tracking
summary_ko: 모바일 마케팅의 측정 방법론이 웹의 단편화 문제를 해결하고 있습니다. 쿠키의 신뢰성 저하와 AI 생성 트래픽 증가로 기존 웹 측정이 어려워지고 있습니다. 모바일에서 검증된 성과 측정 기법이 웹 마케팅에 적용되고 있습니다.
summary_en: Mobile marketing measurement methodologies are solving web fragmentation problems as traditional tracking becomes unreliable. Cookies are increasingly untrustworthy and AI-generated discovery is disrupting observable traffic patterns. Mobile-proven performance measurement techniques are being adapted for web marketing challenges.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 모바일 중심의 통합 측정 전략을 도입하여 크로스 플랫폼 성과를 정확히 추적해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must adopt mobile-centric unified measurement strategies to accurately track cross-platform performance amid attribution challenges.
key_points: Cookie reliability declining across web platforms
AI-generated traffic disrupting traditional measurement
Mobile measurement playbooks offering web solutions
Platform self-reporting showing contradictory data
one_line_insight_ko: AI가 기존 웹 트래킹을 교란하는 상황에서 모바일 측정 기법이 새로운 솔루션으로 부상하고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Mobile measurement techniques are emerging as solutions to web tracking disruption caused by AI-generated traffic.

title: Future of Marketing Briefing: Agentic advertising is closer than you think and further than you hope
description: The gap between agentic advertising’s promise and its reality.
title_en: Agentic Advertising Shows Promise-Reality Gap as Industry Navigates AI Automation Challenges
summary_ko: 에이전틱 광고가 기대와 현실 사이의 격차를 보여주고 있습니다. AI 자동화 광고의 가능성은 크지만 실제 구현은 아직 초기 단계입니다. 마케팅 업계가 AI 에이전트 기반 광고의 한계와 가능성을 탐색하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Agentic advertising is showing a significant gap between its promise and current reality. While AI automation in advertising holds great potential, actual implementation remains in early stages. The marketing industry is exploring both limitations and possibilities of AI agent-based advertising.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 에이전틱 광고 도입 시 현실적인 기대치를 설정하고 점진적 접근이 필요합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands need to set realistic expectations and take gradual approaches when adopting agentic advertising solutions.
key_points: Significant gap between agentic advertising promise and reality
AI automation in advertising still in early development stages
Industry exploring practical implementation challenges
Need for realistic expectations in AI advertising adoption
one_line_insight_ko: 에이전틱 광고는 큰 잠재력을 가지고 있지만 실제 적용까지는 상당한 시간이 필요할 것으로 보입니다.
one_line_insight_en: Agentic advertising holds significant potential but practical implementation will require considerable time to mature.

title: Amer Sports CFO: No visibility on tariff refunds
description: Andrew Page told Retail Dive that the company, which runs Arc’teryx and Salomon, will see little impact from the refunds anyway. Revenue at the business was up 32% in Q1.
title_en: Amer Sports Reports Strong Q1 Growth Despite Uncertain Tariff Environment
summary_ko: 아메르 스포츠가 관세 환급에 대한 가시성이 없다고 발표했습니다. Arc'teryx와 Salomon을 운영하는 회사는 환급의 영향이 미미할 것이라고 밝혔습니다. 1분기 매출이 32% 증가했습니다.
summary_en: Amer Sports CFO stated there's no visibility on tariff refunds affecting the company. The business running Arc'teryx and Salomon expects minimal impact from potential refunds. Revenue grew 32% in Q1 despite tariff uncertainties.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 관세 정책 변화에 대비한 유연한 가격 전략과 공급망 다각화가 필요합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands need flexible pricing strategies and supply chain diversification to prepare for tariff policy changes.
key_points: No clear visibility on tariff refund policies
Amer Sports expects minimal impact from potential refunds
Strong Q1 revenue growth of 32% despite uncertainties
Premium outdoor brands showing resilience
one_line_insight_ko: 프리미엄 아웃도어 브랜드들은 관세 불확실성에도 불구하고 강력한 성장세를 유지하고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Premium outdoor brands are maintaining strong growth momentum despite tariff uncertainties.

title: David’s Bridal is ready to help couples budget their wedding
description: Through the bridal retailer’s Pearl Planner tool, the company is leveraging AI to help couples determine where to splurge and save on their big day.
title_en: David's Bridal Launches AI-Powered Wedding Budget Planning Tool to Enhance Customer Experience
summary_ko: David's Bridal이 AI를 활용한 웨딩 예산 계획 도구를 출시했습니다. Pearl Planner 도구를 통해 커플들이 결혼식에서 어디에 돈을 쓰고 절약할지 결정하도록 돕습니다. AI 기술을 활용해 개인화된 예산 가이드를 제공합니다.
summary_en: David's Bridal launched an AI-powered wedding budget planning tool called Pearl Planner. The tool helps couples determine where to splurge and save on their wedding expenses. The company leverages AI technology to provide personalized budget guidance for wedding planning.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 AI를 활용한 개인화된 구매 계획 도구로 고객 경험을 향상시키고 매출을 증대할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can enhance customer experience and drive sales through AI-powered personalized purchase planning tools.
key_points: AI-powered Pearl Planner tool for wedding budget planning
Helps couples make informed spending decisions
Personalized guidance on where to splurge vs. save
Integration of AI into customer service experience
one_line_insight_ko: AI 기반 예산 계획 도구는 고객의 구매 결정을 지원하며 브랜드 충성도를 높이는 새로운 방법입니다.
one_line_insight_en: AI-powered budget planning tools represent a new way to support customer purchase decisions and build brand loyalty.

title: Report: SMBs struggle to cope with tariffs, supply chain disruptions in 2026
description:
Small and mid-sized businesses (SMBs) in the U.S. are facing new demands as a result of tariff volatility, rising logistics costs and persistent supply chain disruptions, according to survey data from the firm Ship4wd. Through the survey company Pollfish, Ship4wd surveyed 500 SMBs across the U.S. in April 2026. In the findings, 96% of those […]
The post Report: SMBs struggle to cope with tariffs, supply chain disruptions in 2026 appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: SMBs Face Mounting Challenges from Tariff Volatility and Supply Chain Disruptions in 2026
summary_ko: 2026년 미국 중소기업들이 관세 변동성과 공급망 차질로 어려움을 겪고 있습니다. Ship4wd 조사에 따르면 500개 중소기업 중 96%가 새로운 도전에 직면하고 있습니다. 물류 비용 상승과 지속적인 공급망 교란이 주요 문제로 지적되었습니다.
summary_en: Small and mid-sized businesses in the US are struggling with tariff volatility and supply chain disruptions in 2026. A Ship4wd survey of 500 SMBs found that 96% are facing new challenges. Rising logistics costs and persistent supply chain disruptions are identified as major issues.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 공급망 리스크 관리와 비용 효율성 확보를 위한 전략적 대응이 시급합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands urgently need strategic responses for supply chain risk management and cost efficiency optimization.
key_points: 96% of surveyed SMBs facing new operational challenges
Tariff volatility creating uncertainty for business planning
Rising logistics costs pressuring profit margins
Persistent supply chain disruptions affecting operations
one_line_insight_ko: 중소기업들이 직면한 공급망과 관세 문제는 D2C 브랜드들에게도 운영 전략 재검토의 필요성을 시사합니다.
one_line_insight_en: Supply chain and tariff challenges facing SMBs signal the need for D2C brands to reassess their operational strategies.

title: Ecommerce Trends: Which type of online retailer is growing fastest in the 2020s?
description:
With the 2020s more than half over, a new wave of online retailers has pushed ahead to dominate growth in ecommerce sales. The 2026 edition of Digital Commerce 360’s annual Top 1000 Report sheds some light on which types of merchants are growing at the fastest rates. The merchants covered in the report reflect data […]
The post Ecommerce Trends: Which type of online retailer is growing fastest in the 2020s? appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: Ecommerce Trends: Which Online Retailers Are Growing Fastest in the 2020s?
summary_ko: 2020년대 중반 현재, 새로운 유형의 온라인 소매업체들이 전자상거래 성장을 주도하고 있습니다. Digital Commerce 360의 2026년 Top 1000 보고서는 어떤 유형의 판매업체가 가장 빠른 성장률을 보이는지 분석합니다. 이 보고서는 전자상거래 시장의 주요 성장 동향을 보여줍니다.
summary_en: A new wave of online retailers has emerged to dominate ecommerce growth as the 2020s reach their midpoint. Digital Commerce 360's 2026 Top 1000 Report analyzes which types of merchants are experiencing the fastest growth rates. The report provides insights into the key growth trends shaping the ecommerce market.
so_what_ko: LG의 D2C 전략 수립 시 성장 속도가 빠른 온라인 소매 유형을 벤치마킹하여 경쟁력을 강화해야 합니다.
so_what_en: LG's D2C strategy should benchmark fast-growing online retail types to enhance competitiveness in the evolving ecommerce landscape.
key_points: New wave of online retailers dominating 2020s growth
Digital Commerce 360's Top 1000 Report provides market insights
Analysis focuses on merchant types with fastest growth rates
one_line_insight_ko: 2020년대 중반 전자상거래 시장에서 새로운 유형의 온라인 소매업체가 성장을 주도하고 있어 D2C 전략 재검토가 필요합니다.
one_line_insight_en: New types of online retailers are driving ecommerce growth in the mid-2020s, requiring D2C strategy reassessment.

title: Manischewitz celebrates Jewish matchmaking with reality dating series
description: The kosher foods brand is tapping into trends around episodic content with “Manischewitz Matchmakers,” which will air on social media in July.
title_en: Manischewitz Celebrates Jewish Matchmaking with Reality Dating Series
summary_ko: 코셔 식품 브랜드 Manischewitz가 7월에 소셜미디어에서 방영될 '매치메이커스' 리얼리티 데이팅 시리즈를 통해 유대인 중매 문화를 기념합니다. 이 캠페인은 에피소드 콘텐츠 트렌드를 활용한 마케팅 전략입니다. 브랜드가 문화적 정체성과 연결된 콘텐츠 마케팅을 시도하는 사례입니다.
summary_en: Kosher food brand Manischewitz is launching 'Manischewitz Matchmakers,' a reality dating series celebrating Jewish matchmaking culture, set to air on social media in July. The campaign taps into trends around episodic content for marketing purposes. This represents a brand connecting with cultural identity through content marketing.
so_what_ko: LG는 문화적 정체성과 연결된 에피소드 콘텐츠 마케팅을 통해 특정 고객층과의 감정적 유대감을 강화할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: LG can strengthen emotional connections with specific customer segments through episodic content marketing tied to cultural identity.
key_points: Reality dating series leveraging cultural themes for brand marketing
Social media platform strategy for episodic content distribution
Cultural identity-based marketing approach
one_line_insight_ko: 문화적 정체성을 활용한 에피소드 콘텐츠 마케팅이 브랜드 차별화의 새로운 기회를 제공합니다.
one_line_insight_en: Cultural identity-driven episodic content marketing offers new opportunities for brand differentiation.

title: Bad AI customer agent bots are a growing brand risk
description:
74% of enterprises that deployed AI customer agents have rolled them back after governance failures damaged CX and trust.
The post Bad AI customer agent bots are a growing brand risk appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: Bad AI Customer Agent Bots Are a Growing Brand Risk
summary_ko: AI 고객 상담 에이전트를 도입한 기업의 74%가 거버넌스 실패로 인해 고객 경험과 신뢰가 손상되어 시스템을 철회했습니다. 잘못 구현된 AI 챗봇이 브랜드에 심각한 위험을 초래하고 있습니다. AI 고객 서비스 도입 시 적절한 거버넌스와 품질 관리가 필수적입니다.
summary_en: 74% of enterprises that deployed AI customer agents have rolled them back after governance failures damaged customer experience and trust. Poorly implemented AI chatbots are creating serious brand risks for companies. Proper governance and quality control are essential when implementing AI customer service solutions.
so_what_ko: LG는 AI 고객 서비스 도입 시 철저한 거버넌스 체계와 품질 관리 프로세스를 구축하여 브랜드 리스크를 방지해야 합니다.
so_what_en: LG must establish robust governance frameworks and quality control processes when implementing AI customer service to prevent brand risks.
key_points: 74% of enterprises rolled back AI customer agents due to failures
Governance failures damage customer experience and brand trust
Quality control essential for AI customer service implementation
one_line_insight_ko: AI 고객 상담 에이전트 도입 시 거버넌스 실패는 브랜드 신뢰도에 치명적 영향을 미칠 수 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Governance failures in AI customer agent deployment can critically damage brand trust and reputation.

title: Your company may be slow with AI, but you can’t afford to be
description:
Experimenting with AI now gives you the advantage when everyone else tries to catch up.
The post Your company may be slow with AI, but you can’t afford to be appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: Your Company May Be Slow with AI, But You Can't Afford to Be
summary_ko: 많은 기업들이 AI 도입에 신중한 접근을 취하고 있지만, 경쟁 우위 확보를 위해서는 빠른 실험이 필요합니다. 지금 AI를 실험하는 기업들이 다른 기업들이 따라잡으려 할 때 유리한 위치를 차지하게 됩니다. AI 도입 지연은 경쟁력 상실로 이어질 수 있습니다.
summary_en: While many companies are taking a cautious approach to AI adoption, rapid experimentation is necessary for competitive advantage. Companies experimenting with AI now will have an advantage when others try to catch up. Delaying AI adoption could result in competitive disadvantage.
so_what_ko: LG는 AI 도입에서 선도적 위치를 유지하기 위해 신중하면서도 적극적인 실험 전략을 구사해야 합니다.
so_what_en: LG should pursue a cautious yet proactive AI experimentation strategy to maintain leadership position in AI adoption.
key_points: Early AI experimentation provides competitive advantage
Companies delaying AI adoption risk falling behind
Balance between caution and aggressive experimentation needed
one_line_insight_ko: AI 도입에서 실험과 신중함의 균형이 장기적 경쟁 우위의 핵심입니다.
one_line_insight_en: Balancing experimentation with caution in AI adoption is key to long-term competitive advantage.

title: Marketing teams must own AI, or workslop will take over
description:
AI mandates without structure are creating workslop across marketing teams. Here’s how to build a smarter adoption strategy.
The post Marketing teams must own AI, or workslop will take over appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: Marketing Teams Must Own AI, or Workslop Will Take Over
summary_ko: 구조 없는 AI 도입 명령이 마케팅 팀 전반에 비효율적인 업무 혼란을 야기하고 있습니다. 마케팅 팀이 AI를 주도적으로 관리하지 않으면 무질서한 도입으로 인한 문제가 발생합니다. 더 스마트한 AI 도입 전략 구축이 필요합니다.
summary_en: AI mandates without proper structure are creating workslop and inefficiency across marketing teams. Marketing teams must take ownership of AI implementation to prevent chaotic adoption. Building a smarter AI adoption strategy is essential for effective implementation.
so_what_ko: LG 마케팅 조직은 AI 도입을 체계적으로 주도하고 관리하여 업무 혼란을 방지하고 효율성을 극대화해야 합니다.
so_what_en: LG's marketing organization should systematically lead and manage AI adoption to prevent workflow chaos and maximize efficiency.
key_points: Unstructured AI mandates create workslop in marketing teams
Marketing teams need ownership of AI implementation
Strategic approach required for effective AI adoption
one_line_insight_ko: 마케팅 팀의 AI 주도권 확보가 효율적인 디지털 전환의 핵심 요소입니다.
one_line_insight_en: Marketing team ownership of AI is crucial for efficient digital transformation and workflow optimization.

title: Your campaigns span 12 channels. Why does it feel like 12 jobs? by AdPlus
description:
The cross-channel ad ops problem is real and mostly ignored. Here's what it's costing performance marketers — and what's actually changing.
The post Your campaigns span 12 channels. Why does it feel like 12 jobs? appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: Cross-Channel Campaign Management: Why 12 Channels Feel Like 12 Separate Jobs
summary_ko: 다채널 광고 운영의 복잡성이 마케팅 성과에 미치는 부정적 영향에 대해 다룹니다. 12개 채널에 걸친 캠페인이 마치 12개의 별도 업무처럼 느껴지는 현실적 문제를 분석합니다. 성과 마케터들이 직면한 비용과 변화하는 해결방안을 제시합니다.
summary_en: The article addresses the negative impact of cross-channel advertising operations complexity on marketing performance. It analyzes the real problem where campaigns spanning 12 channels feel like managing 12 separate jobs. The piece examines costs faced by performance marketers and emerging solutions to address these challenges.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 통합된 크로스채널 마케팅 플랫폼 도입을 통해 운영 효율성을 극대화하고 마케팅 ROI를 개선할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can maximize operational efficiency and improve marketing ROI by adopting integrated cross-channel marketing platforms.
key_points: Cross-channel ad operations create significant complexity for marketers
Managing multiple channels feels like handling separate jobs
Performance marketers face real costs from operational inefficiencies
Solutions are emerging to address these channel management challenges
one_line_insight_ko: 다채널 마케팅의 복잡성 해결이 D2C 브랜드의 운영 효율성 향상의 핵심입니다.
one_line_insight_en: Solving cross-channel marketing complexity is key to improving operational efficiency for D2C brands.

title: Google Ads in AI Mode Will Help Businesses Be Discovered
description: The changes enable businesses to engage with users directly through questions and real time interactions, improving lead generation and the overall advertising experience.
title_en: Google Ads AI Mode Enhances Business Discovery Through Real-Time Interactions
summary_ko: 구글 광고의 AI 모드가 비즈니스 발견 가능성을 향상시킨다고 발표했습니다. 사용자와의 실시간 상호작용을 통해 기업이 직접 고객과 소통할 수 있게 됩니다. 이를 통해 리드 생성과 전반적인 광고 경험이 개선될 것으로 예상됩니다.
summary_en: Google announced that AI Mode in Google Ads will enhance business discoverability. The changes enable businesses to engage with users directly through real-time interactions and questions. This is expected to improve lead generation and the overall advertising experience.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 구글의 AI 광고 기능을 활용해 고객과의 실시간 상호작용을 강화하고 리드 생성 효율성을 높일 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can leverage Google's AI advertising features to enhance real-time customer interactions and improve lead generation efficiency.
key_points: Google Ads AI Mode improves business discoverability
Real-time user interactions become possible
Lead generation and advertising experience enhanced
Direct customer engagement opportunities increased
one_line_insight_ko: 구글의 AI 광고 모드는 D2C 브랜드의 고객 발견성과 참여도를 혁신적으로 향상시킬 것입니다.
one_line_insight_en: Google's AI advertising mode will revolutionarily enhance customer discoverability and engagement for D2C brands.

title: Medicube, Crocs are betting on TikTok Shop for discovery e-commerce
description: As consumers’ shopping habits evolve, retail is shifting from traditional search-and-scroll e-commerce to a new model that revolves around discovery.  Sitting at the center of that transformation is TikTok Shop, which represents a new retail model centered on community, trust and entertainment-driven discovery. Shopping happens natively and naturally, as TikTok Shop guides users from inspiration […]
title_en: Medicube and Crocs Bet on TikTok Shop for Discovery-Driven E-commerce
summary_ko: 메디큐브와 크록스가 발견 중심 이커머스를 위해 틱톡 쇼핑에 투자하고 있습니다. 소비자 쇼핑 습관 변화로 전통적인 검색 스크롤 방식에서 발견 중심 모델로 전환되고 있습니다. 틱톡 쇼핑은 커뮤니티, 신뢰, 엔터테인먼트 기반 발견을 중심으로 한 새로운 리테일 모델을 제시합니다.
summary_en: Medicube and Crocs are investing in TikTok Shop for discovery-driven e-commerce. Consumer shopping habits are shifting from traditional search-and-scroll to discovery-centered models. TikTok Shop presents a new retail model centered on community, trust, and entertainment-driven discovery.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 틱톡 쇼핑과 같은 소셜 커머스 플랫폼을 통해 엔터테인먼트 기반 발견 쇼핑 경험을 제공해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must embrace social commerce platforms like TikTok Shop to provide entertainment-driven discovery shopping experiences.
key_points: Medicube and Crocs adopting TikTok Shop for discovery commerce
Shift from search-and-scroll to discovery-driven shopping
TikTok Shop represents community and entertainment-centered retail
Native and natural shopping experiences integrated
one_line_insight_ko: 소셜 커머스 플랫폼에서의 발견 중심 쇼핑이 D2C 브랜드의 새로운 성장 동력이 되고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Discovery-driven shopping on social commerce platforms is becoming a new growth engine for D2C brands.

title: #213: AI Answers - What AI Should Never Do, Enterprise Scaling, Governing AI & Navigating IT Roadblocks
description:
Leadership wants AI everywhere. IT security can't keep up. Marketing is racing ahead while legal and finance dig in. And every week brings another story of an AI agent doing something nobody told it to do. Paul Roetzer and Cathy McPhillips answer 15 listener questions on how to actually move organizations forward and where the real opportunities lie for individuals, SMBs, and enterprises right now.

00:00:00 — Intro

00:07:01 — How do you move a company out of AI policy paralysis?

00:08:54 — How should regulated, hands-on teams introduce AI?

00:12:30 — When companies are stuck, what tends to get them moving?

00:15:00 — Should IT security evolve to adopt AI quicker or should businesses slow down?

00:17:43 — What changes an AI-skeptic employee's mind?

00:21:18 — How should early-career professionals prioritize what to learn?

00:23:29 — Is there a point where you should stop learning and start building?

00:27:29 — Where do companies get stuck scaling AI across departments?

00:29:4
title_en: AI Implementation Challenges: From Policy Paralysis to Enterprise Scaling
summary_ko: 기업의 AI 도입 과정에서 발생하는 다양한 도전과제를 다룹니다. 리더십은 AI를 모든 곳에 적용하고 싶어하지만 IT 보안은 따라잡지 못하는 상황입니다. 마케팅은 앞서 나가지만 법무와 재무 부서는 신중한 접근을 취하고 있습니다.
summary_en: The podcast addresses various challenges in enterprise AI implementation. Leadership wants AI everywhere while IT security struggles to keep up. Marketing races ahead while legal and finance departments take cautious approaches.
so_what_ko: D2C 조직은 AI 정책 마비를 해결하고 부서간 협력을 통해 점진적이고 안전한 AI 도입 전략을 수립해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C organizations must overcome AI policy paralysis and establish gradual, secure AI adoption strategies through cross-departmental collaboration.
key_points: Leadership wants AI everywhere but faces organizational resistance
IT security struggles to match AI adoption pace
Marketing leads while legal and finance remain cautious
15 practical questions addressed for moving organizations forward
one_line_insight_ko: 조직 전반의 AI 도입에는 부서간 균형과 단계적 접근이 필수적입니다.
one_line_insight_en: Enterprise-wide AI adoption requires interdepartmental balance and phased approaches.

title: GITEX AI EUROPE
summary_ko: GITEX AI 유럽 컨퍼런스에 대한 기본 정보만 제공되어 있습니다. 구체적인 내용이나 설명이 원문에서 확인되지 않습니다. 2026년 6월 30일에 개최 예정인 AI 관련 이벤트입니다.
summary_en: Only basic information about GITEX AI Europe conference is provided. Specific content or description is not confirmed in the source. The AI-related event is scheduled for June 30, 2026.
so_what_ko: 구체적인 내용 없이는 D2C 비즈니스에 대한 시사점을 파악하기 어렵습니다.
so_what_en: Without specific content, it's difficult to determine implications for D2C business.
